{{CargoRelic
|name=Holmes' Pipe
|rank=Blue
|affct=CIV
|birthday=01-01
|source=Lottery Machine (0.36%), Wishing (10.3%), Novice Scrolls (5%)
|description=On Jan 1, 1870, Sherlock Holmes finally solved the case of the Hound of Baskerville.

When Sherlock Holmes was working on a case, the fire of his pipe always flickered. A legend in Baskerville said that the family was cursed by a fearsome hound. After a few days, Holmes finally managed to catch the murderer and found the truth behind the beast that plagued the Baskervilles for years.

[Famous Quotes]

There is nothing new under the sun. It has all been done before. We are insignificant, and work is everything. You will overcome everything with time. A fool always finds a greater fool to admire him.
|fame=28
|art=30
|fth=20
|civ=45
|tech=31
|ss1=Per Apostle defeated, Snail ATK +3<br>Apostles defeated: 15/15
|ss2=Per Apostle defeated, Snail ATK +6<br>Apostles defeated: 15/15
|ss3=Per Apostle defeated, Snail ATK +9<br>Apostles defeated: 15/15
|ss4=Per Apostle defeated, Snail ATK +15<br>Apostles defeated: 15/15
|ss7=Spot Rogue Survivor once, Snail ATK +15<br>Rogue Survivor Spotted: 20/20<br>Snail ATK +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Britann skill I.png|50px]] Place in Britland Museum: In Britland, Snail HP +200
}}

[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Britland Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Britland Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Lumber Camp Boost]]
[[Category:Offering Speed Boost]]
